title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI tools to accelerate development, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java migration 6x faster than baseline. PayPal projects 40% expanded capabilities by 2026 through AI-enabled development.
